ksa_text: Ability to design technical procedures, processes, and system components, integrating technology solutions into cohesive systems.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-A-003 (TF, Ability) maps to Financial Risk Specialist scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4565 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.457, eu_ai_act=0.454, ddat=0.434. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4565 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA TF-A-003 (TF, composite 0.4565) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles does not surface this TF-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4565 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for TF domain content at composite 0.4565 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4565, domain TF. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
